prestazioni: Engine swap to a 6G74TT (MIVEC twin-turbo V6, 3.5L) with forged internals including JE Pistons 9.5:1 compression ratio, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings. Pair with a Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger (0.96 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 4-inch stainless steel intercooler piping system from HKS.

Full drivetrain reinforcement: Cusco 2.5-way LSD for the front and rear differentials, coupled with a PTT (Power Transfer Technology) transfer case brace. Replace the stock driveshafts with carbon fiber units from Driveshaft Shop rated for 800+ lb-ft torque, and upgrade to a Tilton 7.25-inch twin-disc clutch with billet flywheel.

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valved for the Challenger’s 2,850 kg weight), Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear), and SuperPro poly bushings for the front control arms and subframe. Brake system upgrade to AP Racing CP8660 6-pot calipers with 355mm two-piece rotors and Ferodo DS2500 pads.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny PB-C01 widebody kit with custom carbon fiber overfenders (30mm wider front, 40mm wider rear) and a duckbill rear spoiler. Front bumper replacement with a Seibon carbon fiber lip and custom 3D-printed tow hooks integrated into the splitter.

Custom 19x10.5 ET15 (front) and 19x11.5 ET10 (rear) Volk Racing TE37SL wheels in Hyper Black, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear). Fender flares lined with custom LED turn signals and a full carbon fiber hood with a functional heat extractor from Varis.

Interior stripped and reinforced with a full Cusco bolt-in roll cage (8-point, chromoly), Recaro SP-G seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses, and a custom Alcantara-wrapped dashboard with a Motec C127 dash display. Exterior wrapped in 3M Gloss Flip Psychedelic Purple with matte black accents on the roof and pillars.
